title: carex tristachya subsp. pocilliformis
intro: Carex tristachya subsp. pocilliformis, also known as Pocillo Carex or Three Spurred Sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones. The health benefits of Carex tristachya subsp. pocilliformis include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and promote digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
